queries.query: INSERT INTO ts_object (type_id, object_key, description) VALUES (?, ?, ?) RETURNING object_id
SELECT object_id, type_id, object_key, description, created_at, updated_at FROM ts_object WHERE object_id = ?
SELECT object_id, type_id, object_key, description, created_at, updated_at FROM ts_object WHERE object_key = ?
SELECT object_id, type_id, object_key, description, created_at, updated_at FROM ts_object ORDER BY object_key
SELECT object_id, type_id, object_key, description, created_at, updated_at FROM ts_object WHERE type_id = ?
UPDATE ts_object SET type_id = ?, object_key = ?, description = ?, updated_at = NOW() WHERE object_id = ?
SELECT object_id, type_id, object_key, description, created_at, updated_at FROM ts_object o
